Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}I don't know about you guys, but having Senpai with us is real reassuring for these big fights.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yes, he definitely knows the ins and outs of battle. You're a huge help here, Senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}Ah, you know I got your backs. I've got lost time to make up for, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Pleased to see you're back in fine fettle, Akihiko.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}But, keep in mind the situation's different now—we can't afford to lose you for an extended period again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}No worries there. I've been stuck on the sidelines for long enough—I'm ready to get back out there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3117 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 9 25 25}All right, warm-up's over. Let's pick up the pace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 4 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Huh? We were just warming up? This guy's a beast...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3115 0 0}That went well enough. We've still got a ways to go, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't slack off on the cooldown once we're back at the dorm, folks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}It makes a world of difference in recovery speed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Shoot, the other day, I was so zonked, I just passed out in my boxers on top of my bed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}That sounds like you, Junpei... I'm surprised you didn't catch a cold.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Well, getting told by a seasoned vet like Senpai actually has some weight to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}*chuckle* A "seasoned vet," huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}That reminds me of a story from before you all came to the dorm. A certain person who, after an intense workout in his room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}Passed out from exhaustion, drenched in sweat, then woke up with a raging fever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3126 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 4 3 25 25}Th-That was just— I passed out while still wearing my socks![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 4 25 25}That's enough gabbing, anyway! Let's keep moving, {f 4 1}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}*sigh* What's with these back-to-back fights?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Yeah, this is a first. It's like, pacing, anyone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I can't get a read on a pattern for these floors... There's simply too much about which we're still in the dark.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We need to prepare even more thoroughly, and retreat promptly when we're depleted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}We're really pushing the pace on your first day back. Are you holding up all right, Sanada-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Yeah. Pretty creepy place, huh? I'm actually trembling right now... I can't wait for the next fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2099 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}You're smirking!? What are you, the main character in a fighting manga!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}Good grief... You don't change, do you, Akihiko?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 1}, you're our leader—be sure to stay vigilant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}All right, take out the Gatekeeper agai—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We'll need— ...our way thro— ...here, unti—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Huh? Kirijo-senpai? You're breaking up on us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Sorry about that. Testing, one, two, one, two...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, it's back to normal. Having any trouble on your end?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're pretty high up—the signal must be getting spotty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}What do we do if we get cut off? Kirijo-senpai's sorta like our lifeline here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Recon isn't really in the wheelhouse of Mitsuru's Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}She manages well enough through supplemental equipment, but even that has its limitations...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Sorry to give you cause for concern...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}That being said, our equipment still has a bit more range to spare, so that shouldn't be a problem.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'll try to figure out the connection issues on my end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}You all go ahead and keep exploring for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Your skills are still sharp as ever, Aragaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}I mean, there's some heavy rust for sure, but that's also comparing you to how much stronger I've gotten.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9060 0 0}Tell him, not me—this knucklehead's the one picking a fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's rich, getting called a knucklehead by the king of the knuckleheads.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 10 2 25 25}What are you, a kindergartener!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9113 0 0}Great. The last thing I need's you ridin' the coattails of this knucklehead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}That's rich, getting called a knucklehead by the king of the knuckleheads.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 10 2 25 25}What are you, a kindergartener!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Let's call it a draw for now, you two. I know you have a history together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}But any fool who can't act his age is ripe for execution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Hold it—I'm not finished talking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I expect a relapse prevention report from both of you for hindering club activities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_9_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 10 4 25 25}The hell, you're actually gonna write it!? I'm not writing any stupid report.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 3 25 25}{f 4 23 1 10 3 25 25}I'll give them a more comprehensive talking-to later. For now, let's just keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1113 0 0}Whew, we won! These enemies keep getting tougher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah, but it's an easy win with Aragaki-senpai, right? I mean, watchin' him, you wouldn't know he just got back from leave...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's so badass without lookin' like he's even tryin' to be. How do you think he got like that, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1104 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Interesting... You want to be more like Aragaki-senpai, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Hey, I asked first! Don't copy the personality I'm copying![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 10 6 25 25}Quit obsessin' over something so stupid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2068 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Hoo-boy! That means one day, I'll be oozing with manliness too...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Uh-huh, sure... Give it a good fifty years or so.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 10 6 25 25}Ugh, you make me sound like I belong in a geriatric ward... We've only got a year's difference between us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1078 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}True that. Junpei'll grow moldy before he gets anywhere close to being like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Moldy!? Excuse me, I'm still plenty fresh![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You guys must be what's makin' the crew feel so different this time around...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 4 25 25}Hmm? Did you say something, Aragaki-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've still got work here, don't we? Let's get movin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}As we presumed, the higher we ascend, the stronger the enemies are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Indeed, we must remain vigilant.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}However, the fortuitous return of Aragaki-san has bolstered our forces.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yes, exactly as you say, Koromaru-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are those two actually holdin' a real conversation?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just as Koromaru-san says, we are besties—we understand each other perfectly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 10 4 25 25}Oh, huh... Wait, you really do understand each other, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6058 0 0}I can answer that. We dance to the same beat, in a manner of speaking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Though, whose beat we dance to remains to be determined.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san is saying, "I'm glad Aragaki-san came with us."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}He also said, "Aragaki-san is not only a force in battle, but also very kind to me at the dorm."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}And, "Why, just the other day, he secretly cooked me a full meal—"[n]{f 1 1}
